mnemonics.title: Constructor Choice Guide
mnemonics.content: Cows(V)ary In Size: Contiguous -> Vector -> Indexed -> Struct. Orders them from simplest/least flexible to most complex/most flexible.

mnemonics.title: Lifecycle Steps
mnemonics.content: Can Charlie Use Football? -> Construct, Commit, Use, Free.

mnemonics.title: Vector Arguments
mnemonics.content: Count, Block, Stride, Type (CBST). Remember: 'Count Blocks with Stride of Type'.
